national_policy.description: Letter-format products only. Letter destination gating: policy/restrictions.json + zones.json. Switzerland is not in the EU; CH is domestic when posting from CH. limits[] only for Swiss Post–documented letter operational blocks.
national_policy.notes: Keep limits[] minimal; add a row only when Post CH materially restricts or suspends letters to a destination (verifiable). No parcel-only or generic geopolitical inventories.
